request_json.name: source
request_json.title: Source
request_json.description: convert (user pressed Convert to SI) / auto (GD completion auto-created it). auto never returns an error code, so it can never abort the GD workflow that called it.

request_json.name: auto_pi
request_json.title: Auto PI
request_json.description: Answers SI_SAVE's internal-trading pi_confirm 411 gate: confirmed = also create the buyer's Purchase Invoice, skip = invoice only. Empty on the auto path, which always confirms.

response_json.name: skipped
response_json.title: skipped
response_json.description: 1 = nothing to invoice / already invoiced. NOT a failure.

list.value: This Goods Delivery already has a Sales Invoice.
There is nothing left to invoice on this Goods Delivery.
